zh.Tisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾迪斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Bridmore於大約1483年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾迪斯波利時，她的父親John Bridmore34歲，母親Joan Ogden28歲。她於大約1500年與Sir Henry Houghton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1520年在她的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾丁頓。

zh-hans.Tisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国英格兰維爾爾迪斯波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Bridmore于大约1483年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾迪斯波利时，她的父亲John Bridmore34岁，母亲Joan Ogden28岁。她于大约1500年与Sir Henry Houghton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1520年在她的家乡享年39岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bridmore

meanings: English: perhaps a habitational name from a lost orunidentified place.

variants.name: Pridemore
meanings: English (Leicestershire): variant of   Pridmore  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Prigmore
meanings: English (Midlands): probably a variant of   Pridmore  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Bridmore was born about 1483, in Tisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Bridmore, was 34 and her mother, Joan Ogden, was 28. She married Sir Henry Houghton about 1500. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1520, in her hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in Dinton, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Bridmore est née environ 1483, à Tisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Bridmore, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan Ogden, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Houghton environ 1500. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1520, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Dinton, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Bridmore um 1483 in Tisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bridmore 34 und ihre Mutter Joan Ogden 28. Sie hat um 1500 Sir Henry Houghton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1520 im Alter von 39 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Dinton, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bridmore è nata il circa 1483 nel Tisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Bridmore, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Joan Ogden, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Houghton circa 1500. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1520, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Dinton, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bridmoreが約1483年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアティスブリーで生まれた時，父John Bridmoreは34歳，母Joan Ogdenは28歳であった。約1500年にSir Henry Houghtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1520年に故郷で39歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアディントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bridmore(이)가 대략 1483년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 티스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bridmore(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Ogden(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1500년 Sir Henry Houghton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1520년 그녀의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 딘턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bridmore nasceu aproximadamente 1483, em Tisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Bridmore, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan Ogden, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Houghton aproximadamente 1500. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1520, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Dinton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Bridmore родилась около 1483 г. в местности тисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Bridmore было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Ogden, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Houghton около 1500 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1520 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности динтон, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Bridmore nació aproximadamente 1483, en Tisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Bridmore, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan Ogden, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Henry Houghton aproximadamente 1500. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1520, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Dinton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
